description: Users can hold a natural, real-time spoken conversation with the AI tutor — speaking into their device and receiving a spoken AI response — without the AI cutting them off mid-turn.

Pronunciation, grammar, and vocabulary feedback is only delivered after the user finishes speaking their full turn — never while they are still talking — so their confidence and conversational flow are preserved.
After each speaking turn, the user receives specific pronunciation coaching that identifies exactly what was mispronounced and tells them how to correct it.
After each speaking turn, the user receives grammar corrections written in plain language, with natural alternative phrasings shown so they understand how a fluent speaker would say the same thing.
After each speaking turn, the user receives vocabulary suggestions pointing out more natural, precise, or advanced word choices they could have used.
When a new user starts for the first time, the product assesses their current English ability and places them into one of three levels: Beginner, Intermediate, or Advanced.
Each user gets a personalized lesson plan that is automatically created from their proficiency level and session history, and is continuously updated as they practice.
The vocabulary, topic complexity, and grammar expectations of conversations automatically match the user's current level and increase as the user improves over time.

During sign-up or onboarding, users choose one or more learning goals from a set list: Daily Conversation, Business English, Travel, Job Interviews, Presentations, and Exam Prep (IELTS/TOEFL). The product tailors content to those goals.
Users can practice speaking through structured real-life scenarios covering everyday situations such as ordering food, travelling, business meetings, job interviews, and giving presentations.
Every day, the product offers the user a short practice challenge. Completing it counts towards their daily streak and reinforces a consistent daily habit.
The product tracks and displays how many consecutive days the user has completed at least one practice session, motivating them to keep their streak alive.
If a user misses a full calendar day without completing any practice, their streak counter resets to zero.
The dashboard shows a daily speaking goal with a progress bar so users can see how much of today's target they have already completed.
The product calculates and displays a cumulative pronunciation score for each user, which is updated after every session and shown prominently on the dashboard.
The product calculates and displays a grammar improvement score for each user, updated over time and shown on the dashboard so users can see their grammatical progress.
The product counts and displays how many vocabulary items the user has learned or been corrected on, giving them a tangible measure of their word-knowledge growth.
The dashboard shows a list of words the user recently encountered, learned, or was corrected on during practice sessions.
The dashboard includes a visual chart showing the user's learning activity and improvement over the past week.
The dashboard surfaces recommended upcoming practice sessions chosen specifically for the user based on their learning plan and weaker areas.
The dashboard displays AI-generated personalized insights and tips drawn from the user's session history to guide their next learning steps.
The dashboard always shows the user's current proficiency level — Beginner, Intermediate, or Advanced — so they know exactly where they stand.
As a user's scores and performance improve, the product automatically promotes them to a higher proficiency level (e.g., Beginner to Intermediate, Intermediate to Advanced).
The product awards and displays achievement badges when users reach defined milestones such as streak lengths, sessions completed, or score thresholds, to keep them motivated.
The product sends users a daily reminder to complete their speaking practice.
The product sends users a weekly summary notification recapping their learning progress over the past week.
When the product detects a user has been inactive for a period of time, it sends a motivational message to encourage them to return and practice.
The product sends reminders prompting users to revisit and review words they have previously learned.
The product sends notifications suggesting targeted pronunciation practice in areas where the user has shown weakness.
The product notifies users when they reach a progress milestone or earn an achievement badge.
The product sends users personalized practice exercises generated from mistakes they made in previous sessions.
Users can individually enable or disable each notification type and set how frequently they receive them; the product respects these preferences at all times.
The AI tutor is available at any hour of the day or night, every day, with no scheduled downtime, supporting users in any time zone.
All feedback, AI responses, and product copy frame every mistake as a normal part of learning. No language is negative, condescending, or discouraging.
Each user's profile, progress scores, streak, learned words, goals, and preferences are saved and available whenever and wherever they log in — across sessions and devices.
Users must create an account and log in to access their personalized learning features, progress history, and notification settings.
The product retains enough information from each practice session to power personalized exercises, adaptive learning adjustments, and AI coaching insights.
The product asks for microphone access before voice sessions begin and provides clear, friendly guidance to users who have blocked or not yet granted microphone permissions.
The product transcribes what the user says accurately enough to detect grammar errors, pronunciation issues, and vocabulary choices that warrant coaching.
The AI tutor responds to users in natural-sounding spoken audio, not as written text on screen, keeping the experience genuinely conversational.
The AI responds quickly enough after each user turn that the conversation feels natural — with a target of under 3 seconds per reply.
The product's visual design uses Indigo (#6366F1) as its primary color, Plus Jakarta Sans for headings, and Inter for body text, consistently throughout the experience.
The product works on mobile devices so that users can practice English on the go, not only at a desktop computer.
Voice recordings and personal learning data are handled in line with applicable privacy laws. Users can request deletion of their data at any time.
The product maintains a library of practice scenarios spanning at least the six core domains: food ordering, travel, business meetings, job interviews, presentations, and exam preparation.
The product uses visual motivators — such as vibrant progress indicators, interactive cards, and animations — to make the learning experience feel engaging and rewarding, not like a chore.
